flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Oakton College fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (6.9k → 6.1k).

flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Oakton College are 25% above the public certificate-predominant peer median ($47.9k vs $38.4k).
